summary: Iteration 36 — verified the 4 reported fixes: (1) landing-token URL resolver now hardcodes hub.creativemojo.co.uk (production) and ignores the preview cluster URL; (2) signature_html keeps 'Devon EX15 1NB' on a single line via   in both occurrences; (3) EnvBanner is pinned bottom-LEFT (left=12px, right=auto), nothing covers the bottom-right modal Send button; (4) Reply modal Attached PDFs list filters by `{{file:<placeholder>}}` tokens present in body_html — orphans are hidden. Both regressions (public /info page renders big red PDF icon + yellow Download button, /admin/email-templates list still loads) pass.

verified_items.evidence: pytest test_resolve_landing_tokens_uses_production_hub: with PUBLIC_BASE_URL unset and request_base='https://licensee-vault.cluster-7.deploy.emergentcf.cloud', _resolve_landing_tokens returned 'https://hub.creativemojo.co.uk/info/creative-mojo-franchise-pack?t=test-123'. Forbidden tokens (licensee-vault, cluster, emergentcf) absent. Also verified PUBLIC_BASE_URL override path still works.

seed_email_templates.SIGNATURE_HTML contains 'EX15 1NB' x2 (signature line + footer registered-address); no plain-space 'EX15 1NB' anywhere. GET /api/email-templates/<id> returns signature_html with the same fix (2 occurrences confirmed live).

Computed style at /admin/email-templates: position=fixed, left=12px, right=1709px (i.e. left side of 1920px viewport), bottom=12px, rect.x=12. elementFromPoint(vp.w-50, vp.h-30) returned <main class='flex-1 min-w-0'> — no overlay at bottom-right. Visual screenshot also confirms 'PREVIEW · deployed just now' pill sits in bottom-left.

Live fetch of /api/email-templates: franchise template has attachments=[franchise_pack] and body_html includes '{{file:franchise_pack}}'. Filter produces [franchise_pack] (visible). Orphan-case simulation (attachment whose placeholder absent from body) correctly produces []. No 'needs an R2 file picked' warnings appear for missing tokens.
Page renders 'Creative Mojo Franchise Pack' heading, large red PDF icon and yellow 'DOWNLOAD THE INFO PACK' button. Screenshot captured.

verified_items.item: REGRESSION — Template name editing page loads
verified_items.evidence: /admin/email-templates loads, 'Franchise Enquiry Reply' visible in list; 2 templates returned from API.

critical_code_review_comments: resend_routes.py:127-131 — the `or` chain `PUBLIC_BASE_URL or 'https://hub.creativemojo.co.uk' or request_base` makes `request_base` permanently unreachable because the middle string literal is always truthy. The docstring at line 110 still describes request_base as a 'last-resort fallback' which is misleading. Either drop the request_base argument and docstring item, or use `or None` to make the literal a conditional default. Behaviour is correct for this bug fix (cluster URL must NEVER leak), but the code reads confusingly.

Console: 'tiptap warn: Duplicate extension names found: [link, underline]' still fires 4x on /admin/email-templates load — same warning called out in iteration_35. Non-blocking but accumulates noise; should be cleaned up by removing the explicit Link/Underline extensions from RichTextEditor.jsx (StarterKit already provides them).

ReplyWithTemplateModal.jsx:206-231 — filter+map IIFE works correctly. Suggestion: extract into a small useMemo hook so the filter doesn't re-run on every keystroke in the WYSIWYG editor; minor perf win only.
seed_data_creation: Inserted/removed a transient `landing_pages` document with slug='creative-mojo-franchise-pack' (id='test-iter36') if absent, cleaned up by the test's finally block. Actually it already existed so we didn't insert.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 reported fixes verified end-to-end. The new regression test file /app/backend/tests/test_iter36_email_fixes.py covers (a) landing-token resolver precedence and (b) signature postcode   — re-run it any time resend_routes.py or seed_email_templates.py is touched. The frontend filter logic for Attached PDFs is verified via live API + an in-Python simulation of the JS filter; if a future change moves the filter to a hook, also add a Playwright test that opens the Reply modal on a real contact (sales-contacts > drawer > 'Reply with template' button > pick 'Franchise Enquiry Reply' > inspect [data-testid='reply-preview']).
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found; all reported fixes verified.
